{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91620858?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Rootingg", "id": 91620858, "login": "Rootingg", "node_id": "U_kgDOBXYF-g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47676", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-444", "name": "Inconsistent Interpretation of HTTP Requests ('HTTP Request/Response Smuggling')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-693", "name": "Protection Mechanism Failure"}], "description": "### Summary

`app.mount()` strips the mount prefix from the incoming request path using the raw URL pathname, while route matching is performed against the percent-decoded path. This inconsistency causes the prefix to be stripped at the wrong position when the path contains percent-encoded multi-byte characters, resulting in the mounted sub-application receiving an incorrect path.

### Details

When `app.mount(prefix, subApp)` is called, Hono calculates the number of characters to strip based on the decoded mount prefix length, but then applies that slice to the raw URL pathname. When the URL contains percent-encoded characters that expand to fewer characters when decoded (such as encoded non-ASCII characters), the two representations have different lengths, so the prefix is stripped at the wrong byte offset.

As a result, the sub-application receives a path that does not correspond to the intended sub-path — it may receive a partial or garbled path instead of the expected value after the mount prefix is removed.

This issue arises when an application uses `app.mount()` with paths that contain percent-encoded characters, particularly when the mount prefix itself or the request path contains encoded non-ASCII characters.

### Impact

A mounted sub-application may receive an incorrectly stripped path, causing requests to be routed to unintended handlers within the sub-application.

This may lead to:

- Middleware or route handlers in the sub-application being bypassed or incorrectly matched due to the malformed path
- Requests reaching sub-application routes that the developer did not intend to be accessible via the mounted path

This issue affects applications that use `app.mount()` where the request URL may contain percent-encoded characters in the mount prefix or subsequent path segments.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0026, "percentile": 0.17089}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T18:01:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47676"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-06-04T18:01:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47676", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/commit/6cbb025ff87fca1a3d00d0ccca0eaf3a6385c3f1", "https://github.com/honojs/hono/releases/tag/v4.12.21", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "Hono: app.mount() strips mount prefix using undecoded path, causing incorrect routing for percent-encoded paths", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T18:01:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2gcr-mfcq-wcc3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.21", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.21"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Hono: app.mount() strips mount prefix using undecoded path, causing incorrect routing for percent-encoded paths
